div.div:
Watches (wake-up sources)
•
MxlReceiver
(owned)
•
MxlFlowMirror
(mapped to receivers
by spec.flowID - wakes the
reconciler on readiness AND on
bound-mirror deletion, instead of
waiting on the 10h cache resync)
Pods are
listed
, not watched -
the 10s requeue covers scheduling races.

div.div:
for each target ≠ sourceNode:
name = mirrorName(flowID, target)
(deterministic; the agent's
intent.Dispatcher uses the
identical algorithm - declarative
and intent paths converge on one CR)
Create MxlFlowMirror if absent
